name: Mondel Bread Italian
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Form 3 separate loaves.
3. Top each loaf with an egg.
4. Cook on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Slice diagonally when warm.
6. Sprinkle confectioners sugar on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until golden.
